required_documents.name: DS-160 Confirmation Page
required_documents.why: Primary application record; embassy cannot schedule an interview without the barcode-confirmed DS-160.

required_documents.name: Form I-797 Approval Notice
required_documents.why: Proof USCIS approved the petition; without it the consular officer cannot verify petition status.

required_documents.name: Valid Passport (6+ months validity)
required_documents.why: Visa sticker requires a valid page margin period beyond intended stay.

required_documents.name: Passport Photo (2x2in, white bg)
required_documents.why: Standard biometric requirement; non-compliant photos are rejected at the counter.

required_documents.name: Employment Verification Letter
required_documents.why: Confirms job title, salary, and duties needed to establish specialty occupation criteria.

required_documents.name: Educational Credentials + Evaluation
required_documents.why: Required to prove the specialty-occupation degree requirement under INA 214(i)(1).

required_documents.name: Signed Visa Application Form
required_documents.why: Unsigned forms are rejected at submission.

required_documents.name: Passport (10yr issue, 3mo+ validity, 2 blank pages)
required_documents.why: Standard Schengen passport validity and blank-page requirement.

required_documents.name: Biometric Photo (35x45mm)
required_documents.why: Schengen biometric photo spec required for visa sticker printing.

required_documents.name: Travel Insurance (EUR 30,000 min)
required_documents.why: Mandatory Schengen-wide medical/repatriation coverage; insufficient coverage is an automatic rejection.

required_documents.name: Round-trip Flight Reservation
required_documents.why: Demonstrates planned entry/exit dates within the Schengen area.

required_documents.name: Hotel Booking / Invitation Letter
required_documents.why: Proof of accommodation for every night of stay is required.

required_documents.name: Proof of Financial Means (3mo bank statements)
required_documents.why: Must show ~EUR 45/day to demonstrate ability to self-fund the trip.

required_documents.name: Employment Proof + Leave Letter
required_documents.why: Used to establish strong ties to home country and intent to return.
